---
reference: inspect_ai.viewer
description: Customize Inspect view behavior.
---

## Viewer
### ViewerConfig

## Scanner Results
### ScannerResultView

## Sample Score Panel
### SampleScoreView
### SampleScoreViewSort

## Sample List
### TaskSamplesView
### TaskSamplesColumn
### TaskSamplesSort

## Score Colors
### ScoreColorScale

## Fields
### MetadataField
### ScannerResultField
